ideas.why: The Iman Gadzhi brand breakdown video generated an insane 21.88x outlier ratio, proving audiences are obsessed with the psychology behind high-ticket personal brands.
ideas.hook: Iman Gadzhi doesn't sell courses. He sells an enemy.
ideas.linkedin_post:
Iman Gadzhi doesn't sell courses. He sells an enemy.

His $100M brand is built on a classic direct-response marketing blueprint: Us vs. Them.

He doesn't just pitch self-improvement.
He targets the "system," the 9-to-5 trap, and the "matrix."

By defining a clear villain, he turns his customers into a tribe.

Here is how you can use this positioning in your copy:

1. Identify the common frustration your market faces (e.g., slow agencies, outdated advice).
2. Give that frustration a clear, identifiable name.
3. Position your offer as the only weapon to defeat it.

People don't just buy solutions.
They buy alliances.

Who is the villain in your brand story?
instagram_slides: Iman Gadzhi's $100M psychological trick.
He doesn't sell courses or software.
He sells an enemy.
He targets the 'matrix' and the 9-to-5 trap.
By defining a clear villain, he builds a tribe.
People don't buy products.
They buy alliances against a common frustration.
Define your market's villain to win.
Follow for daily direct-response breakdowns.
ideas.instagram_caption: The best brands don't just sell products—they build alliances. Here is how to use the 'Us vs. Them' framework in your copy. #copywriting #personalbranding #marketingtips #positioning #directresponse
ideas.x_hook:

Here is the direct-response psychology behind his $100M brand:

ideas.why: Cult-like branding psychology videos are massive outliers (8.14x and 5.3x), showing that founders want to move away from transactional sales to high-loyalty audiences.
ideas.hook: How to build a cult-like brand in 3 steps.
ideas.linkedin_post:
Most personal brands are boring because they try to please everyone.

If you want a cult-like following, you must do the opposite.

Great direct-response copy is polarizing. It attracts the right people and violently repels the wrong ones.

Here is the 3-step psychological framework to build a cult-like brand:

1. The Shared Enemy: Find the one thing your ideal clients hate (e.g., bloated agencies, fake promises) and call it out.
2. The Secret Language: Use terms and frameworks that only your inner circle understands. It builds instant belonging.
3. The Initiation: Create a high-value, free resource that proves your mechanism works before they ever pay you.

Stop trying to be liked by everyone.
Be obsessed over by a few.

Are you playing it too safe with your copy?
instagram_slides: Build a cult-like brand in 3 steps.
Stop trying to please everyone.
Polarizing copy attracts the best buyers.
Step 1: Define the Shared Enemy.
Step 2: Create a Secret Language.
Step 3: Build an Initiation Resource.
Be obsessed over by a few, not ignored by many.
Save this post to fix your positioning.
ideas.instagram_caption: Playing it safe is the fastest way to stay invisible. Use these 3 psychological steps to build a hyper-loyal audience. #brandstrategy #copywriting #marketingtips #psychologyofselling #personalbrand
ideas.x_hook:
Most brands are too boring to be remembered.

Here is the 3-step psychological framework to build a cult-like following:

ideas.why: 30-day growth and marketing plans hit high outlier ratios (26.91x), demonstrating that businesses want fast, actionable, calendar-based roadmaps.
ideas.hook: Your sales page is bleeding cash. Fix it in 30 days.
ideas.linkedin_post:
Your sales page is bleeding cash.

Here is a 30-day plan to plug the leaks and boost conversions, without changing your offer.

Days 1-10: Redo your hook.
If your headline doesn't state a specific, desired outcome in 5 seconds, they leave. No cute metaphors.

Days 11-20: Clean up the friction.
Remove extra form fields. Make the checkout process a single click. Reduce cognitive load.

Days 21-30: Rewrite your social proof.
Replace generic "Anas is great" testimonials with specific, metric-driven before-and-after case studies.

Simple tweaks. Massive leverage.

Which of these three steps is your funnel missing right now?
instagram_slides: Fix your bleeding sales page in 30 days.
No offer changes. Just optimization.
Days 1-10: Redo your hook.
State a specific outcome in 5 seconds.
Days 11-20: Clean up checkout friction.
Remove unnecessary form fields.
Days 21-30: Rewrite your social proof.
Use metric-driven before-and-after results.
DM 'FUNNEL' to analyze your sales page.

ideas.why: AI content automation with Claude is pulling massive view counts (3.69x, 2.07x, 1.4x), making it a goldmine topic for Anas's AI-assisted copywriting positioning.
ideas.hook: How I write 10 launch emails in 15 minutes using Claude.
ideas.linkedin_post:
Most copywriters use AI wrong.

They ask Claude to "write a high-converting email."

The result? Generic, boring fluff that lands in spam.

Here is my exact 3-step workflow to get premium copy from Claude:

1. Feed it raw data: Paste your customer interviews, negative reviews of competitors, and target pain points.
2. Force a persona: Tell Claude to write like a direct-response legend (e.g., Eugene Schwartz) with zero adjectives.
3. Edit for flavor: Let AI do the heavy lifting of drafting, then spend your time polishing the hook and CTA.

AI won't replace copywriters.
But copywriters who use AI will replace those who don't.

Have you tried feeding raw voice-of-customer data to Claude yet?
instagram_slides: Write 10 launch emails in 15 minutes.
Stop asking Claude for 'high-converting' copy.
That prompt only generates generic fluff.
Step 1: Feed it raw Voice-of-Customer data.
Step 2: Force a direct-response persona.
Step 3: Edit for flavor, hooks, and CTAs.
Use AI for speed. Use humans for strategy.
Save this post for your next launch.
ideas.instagram_caption: Stop using basic prompts and getting basic copy. This 3-step Claude workflow will cut your writing time by 90%. #ai copywriting #claudegpt #directresponse #emailmarketing #copywritingtips

ideas.why: The 'Update company email signatures in 2 minutes' video was a massive 15.86x outlier, proving that quick, high-leverage email hacks have huge appeal.
ideas.hook: You are wasting your email footer.
ideas.linkedin_post:
You are wasting your email footer.

Most founders leave their email signature blank or use a boring corporate logo.

That is prime real estate.

In direct-response email marketing, the P.S. and the footer are the most read parts of the entire message.

Here are 3 ways to turn your email signature into a passive lead generator:

1. Add a 1-sentence micro-CTA to your latest case study.
2. Add a direct link to book a 15-minute strategy call.
3. Add a link to your absolute best-performing LinkedIn post.

It takes 2 minutes to change.
It runs on autopilot forever.

What does your email signature say right now?
instagram_slides: You are wasting your email footer.
The footer is prime conversion real estate.
The P.S. is the most read part of any email.
Tweak 1: Add a 1-sentence case study link.
Tweak 2: Add a direct booking link.
Tweak 3: Link your best social post.
Take 2 minutes to update it today.
Follow for more high-ROI email hacks.

ideas.topic: The Shift from Writer to Strategist
ideas.why: High-income skills for young creators are massive outliers (61.66x). Positioning copywriting as a high-level creative strategy is critical as AI commoditizes basic writing.
ideas.hook: Copywriting is changing. Here is the skill you need now.
ideas.linkedin_post:
Copywriting is changing.

Writing basic words is now a commodity. Anyone with a ChatGPT account can do it.

If you want to charge premium rates, you must shift from a writer to a strategist.

Strategists don't just write copy.
They design the entire conversion journey.

They map out the email sequences, refine the offer positioning, and build the funnel logic.

AI can write the draft.
But AI cannot understand human psychology, market sophistication, or brand voice transition.

Double down on strategy, positioning, and conversion psychology.

That is how you remain irreplaceable.

Are you positioning yourself as a writer or a strategist?
instagram_slides: Copywriting is changing. Are you ready?
Basic writing is officially a commodity.
AI can draft a basic email in 5 seconds.
To charge premium rates, you must adapt.
Shift from a writer to a strategist.
Strategists design the entire conversion journey.
They map funnel logic and positioning.
AI writes the drafts. You write the strategy.
Save this post to stay ahead.
ideas.instagram_caption: AI has commoditized basic writing. The real money is in creative strategy and conversion psychology. #copywriting #creative strategy #aiandmarketing #marketingtips #careeradvice
ideas.x_hook:
AI has officially commoditized basic copywriting.
